name: System Prompt Logger
description: Logs the final assembled system prompt for each LLM request.

filePath.description: Path to append JSONL records containing the resolved system prompt. Default: $OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR/logs/request-system-prompts.log

includePrompt.description: Also include the user prompt string (can be large/sensitive).

maxBytes.description: Rotate when log file exceeds this size (bytes). Default: 10MB.

maxFiles.description: Max rotated files to keep. Oldest are deleted.
